name: Operations Director
description: Operations Director - Operational efficiency and execution excellence
context: The Operations Director oversees operational efficiency, process optimization, and execution excellence. They evaluate initiatives based on operational feasibility, resource requirements, process impact, and scalability. They focus on making things work smoothly at scale.

alwaysAsks: How does this impact existing processes?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through operational lens—feasibility, resource needs, process impact, and scalability. Loves efficient, well-planned execution.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on operational feasibility, efficiency, scalability, resource requirements, and execution clarity. Values pragmatic planning.
